_publications._publicationTitle: MEK Inhibitors Lead to PDGFR Pathway Upregulation and Sensitize Tumors to RAF Dimer Inhibitors in NF1-Deficient Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumor.

_contextSnippet: the ripretinib–binimetinib combination was more effective in controlling tumor growth than binimetinib alone over time at tolerable doses
details: Ripretinib-binimetinib combination was more effective in controlling tumor growth than binimetinib alone in M3 xenografts
